title: Bio Critters
body:
![Bio Critters logo](https://imgur.com/a/QCjpZE1)

Bio Critters is a mod that adds new creatures with vanilla mechanics to your Minecraft world.

Note: This mod is in Alpha phase, so more content will be added in the future. We also want you to report any bugs you see to our Discord server so we can fix them in future updates.

![Capybara](https://imgur.com/a/pFPTUW7)

Creature List (So Far)
- Peccary
Content List (So Far)
- Rotten Apple
- Peccary Skin
- Peccary Hood
